title: Turkish Vegan Flatbread
description: A crispy and flavorful flatbread inspired by Turkish cuisine, made with rich ingredients and perfect for snacking.
instructions: 2. Roll out the flatbread to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
3. Brush the flatbread with rich olive oil.
4. Top the flatbread with diced Turkish tomato, thinly sliced crispy red onion, minced garlic, and a sprinkle of salt.
5. Bake the flatbread in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
6. Remove the flatbread from the oven and sprinkle with chopped fresh parsley.
7. Cut the flatbread into slices and serve hot.
